description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs Ruby tests across multiple Ruby versions. Use a before_script that checks ruby location, prints the Ruby version, and runs bin/install-dependencies. Define four jobs named test-2.3, test-2.4, test-2.5, and test-2.6, each using the ruby:2.3, ruby:2.4, ruby:2.5, and ruby:2.6 Docker images respectively, and each executing the shared script: bin/run bundle:check, bin/run lint:style, bin/run lint:maintainability, bin/run spec. All jobs run in the default test stage with no caches, artifacts, or special triggers.
